decision_summary: The V7 slice is ready because launch preparation and outcome review are completed in both adoption surfaces and the claim remains tightly bounded to that lifecycle proof.

launch_roles.responsibility: Approve the V7.0 promotion for lifecycle traceability through outcome review.
Confirm the starter workspace remains the reusable adoption surface for the promoted V7 slice.
Confirm launch preparation, release communication, and outcome review are explicitly attached to the canonical item trace.

claim_readiness.claim: The V7 bundle proves lifecycle traceability through launch preparation and outcome review in both adoption surfaces.
The V7 release communication remains bounded to lifecycle traceability rather than broader publication-platform scope.

checks.name: Reference workspace lifecycle trace reaches outcome_review
checks.notes: The reference workspace exposes one item-first lifecycle trace from discovery through launch preparation and outcome review.

checks.name: Starter-workspace adoption parity through outcome_review
checks.notes: The starter workspace mirrors the selected lifecycle-traceability path through launch preparation and outcome review.

checks.name: Trace focus-area coverage
checks.notes: All advertised trace focus areas remain backed by concrete workspace snapshots behind the CLI surface.

checks.name: No deferred post-release_readiness stages remain
checks.notes: Launch preparation and outcome review are completed across both adoption surfaces in the promoted V7 slice.
